SEARCH
Package pe.ask.persistence.core.helper

Class ReactiveAdapterOperation<D,E,I,R extends org.springframework.data.repository.reactive.ReactiveCrudRepository<E,I> & org.springframework.data.repository.query.ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor<E>>

java.lang.Object
pe.ask.persistence.core.helper.ReactiveAdapterOperation<D,E,I,R>
Type Parameters:
D - the domain model type
E - the entity model type
I - the identifier type
R - the reactive repository type
@Deprecated(since="1.0.4") public abstract class ReactiveAdapterOperation<D,E,I,R extends org.springframework.data.repository.reactive.ReactiveCrudRepository<E,I> & org.springframework.data.repository.query.ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor<E>> extends Object
Deprecated.
since 1.0.4, use ReactiveOperationsHelper instead.
Deprecated abstract base class for reactive adapter operations.

Provided basic CRUD operations by mapping between domain models and database entities.

      Deprecated.
      Converts an entity to a domain model.
      Parameters:
      entity - the entity
      Returns:
      the corresponding domain model

    • save

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<D> save(D domain)
      Deprecated.
      Saves a domain model.
      Parameters:
      domain - the domain model to save
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the saved domain model

    • saveAll

      public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<D> saveAll(reactor.core.publisher.Flux<D> domains)
      Deprecated.
      Saves multiple domain models.
      Parameters:
      domains - a Flux of domain models to save
      Returns:
      a Flux emitting the saved domain models

      id - the identifier
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the domain model if found

    • existsById

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Boolean> existsById(I id)
      Deprecated.
      Checks if a domain model exists by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the identifier
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting true if it exists, false otherwise

      Returns:
      a Flux emitting the matching domain models

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<org.springframework.data.domain.Page<D>> findPaginated(D domain, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

      Finds a paginated list of domain models matching the given example.
      Parameters:
      domain - the example domain model
      pageable - the pagination information
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the paginated result

    • findPaginated

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<org.springframework.data.domain.Page<D>> findPaginated(D domain, int page, int size, String sort, String direction)
      Deprecated.
      Finds a paginated list of domain models matching the given example with sorting.
      Parameters:
      domain - the example domain model
      page - the page number
      size - the page size
      sort - the sort field
      direction - the sort direction
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the paginated result
